hairstyles.name: U-Cut Layers
hairstyles.description: A layered cut where the bottom of the hair is trimmed into a soft, rounded U-shape rather than a blunt straight line. Worn long with soft waves through the ends in a walnut-brown tone with mocha undertones, it preserves overall length while adding gentle volume and movement.
hairstyles.alt_text: Woman with long wavy brunette U-Cut Layers hairstyle, soft rounded ends
hairstyles.seo_title: U-Cut Layers Hairstyle — Long Wavy Brunette Look | WallRank
hairstyles.seo_description: U-Cut Layers: long wavy hair trimmed into a soft rounded U-shape at the ends, shown in walnut brown with mocha tones. See the full look on WallRank.
hairstyles.og_description: Long, wavy, softly rounded ends in warm walnut brown — U-Cut Layers.
hairstyles.pinterest_description: U-Cut Layers hairstyle inspiration — long wavy layers, soft rounded ends, walnut brown tones. Save for your next salon visit! #ucutlayers #haircutideas #longhair #koreanhairstyle

hairstyles.name: Face-Framing Layers
hairstyles.description: Shorter layers cut around the face that draw attention toward the eyes and cheekbones while blending into the rest of the length. Shown here on long, softly wavy hair in a medium brown base with beige balayage for dimension.
hairstyles.alt_text: Woman with long wavy face-framing layers hairstyle and beige balayage
hairstyles.seo_title: Face-Framing Layers Hairstyle — Beige Balayage | WallRank
hairstyles.seo_description: Face-framing layers hairstyle inspiration: soft wavy layers with beige balayage that highlight the eyes and cheekbones. See the full look on WallRank.
hairstyles.og_description: Soft wavy layers with beige balayage, framing the face beautifully.
hairstyles.pinterest_description: Face-framing layers hairstyle inspiration — soft layers, beige balayage, effortless movement. Save this look! #faceframinglayers #balayage #haircutideas #layeredhair

hairstyles.name: Italian Bob
hairstyles.description: A sleek, chin-to-jaw-length bob with a glossy, blunt finish, associated with polished Italian styling. Shown here in a deep espresso-black base with soft mocha brown undertones for subtle warmth.
hairstyles.alt_text: Woman with a sleek short black Italian Bob hairstyle
hairstyles.seo_title: Italian Bob Hairstyle — Sleek Espresso Black | WallRank
hairstyles.seo_description: The Italian Bob: a sleek, glossy chin-length bob shown in deep espresso black with mocha undertones. See the full look on WallRank.
hairstyles.og_description: Sleek, glossy, chin-length — the Italian Bob in espresso black.
hairstyles.pinterest_description: Italian Bob hairstyle inspiration — sleek espresso black, effortlessly chic. Save this look! #italianbob #bobhaircut #blackhair #shorthairinspo

hairstyles.name: Hush Cut
hairstyles.description: A softer, quieter take on a layered shag — long wavy layers with wispy face-framing bangs, styled for gentle, natural movement rather than dramatic texture. Shown in dark mocha with soft ash brown undertones.
hairstyles.alt_text: Woman with a long wavy Hush Cut hairstyle in dark mocha with wispy bangs
hairstyles.seo_title: Hush Cut Hairstyle — Soft Wavy Layers | WallRank
hairstyles.seo_description: The Hush Cut: soft, wavy layered hair with wispy face-framing bangs in dark mocha tones. See the full look on WallRank.
hairstyles.og_description: Soft, wavy, quietly beautiful — the Hush Cut in dark mocha.
hairstyles.pinterest_description: Hush Cut hairstyle inspiration — soft wavy layers, wispy bangs, dark mocha tones. Save this look! #hushcut #kbeauty #layeredhaircut #softbangs

hairstyles.name: French Bob
hairstyles.description: A chin-length, blunt-cut bob with a wispy fringe, associated with effortless Parisian styling. Shown in a dark coffee base with chestnut brown undertones and a sleek, straight finish.
hairstyles.alt_text: Woman with a straight short French Bob hairstyle with fringe
hairstyles.seo_title: French Bob Hairstyle — Dark Coffee Chin-Length Cut | WallRank
hairstyles.seo_description: The French Bob: a soft, chin-length blunt bob with fringe, shown in dark coffee with chestnut undertones. See the full look on WallRank.
hairstyles.og_description: Chin-length, blunt, effortlessly Parisian — the French Bob.
hairstyles.pinterest_description: French Bob hairstyle inspiration — chin-length, dark coffee tones, effortless Parisian style. Save this look! #frenchbob #bobhaircut #shorthairinspo

hairstyles.name: Long Curtain Layers
hairstyles.description: Long, wavy layers parted centrally that frame the face like curtains, sweeping outward with volume around the cheekbones and temples. Shown in a soft chestnut base with golden brown undertones for warmth.
hairstyles.alt_text: Woman with long wavy Curtain Layers hairstyle framing the face, golden brown tones
hairstyles.seo_title: Long Curtain Layers Hairstyle — Golden Brown | WallRank
hairstyles.seo_description: Long Curtain Layers: face-framing wavy layers in soft chestnut with golden brown undertones. See the full look on WallRank.
hairstyles.og_description: Center-parted, face-framing, flowing golden brown — Long Curtain Layers.
hairstyles.pinterest_description: Long Curtain Layers hairstyle inspiration — soft face-framing layers, golden brown tones. Save this look! #curtainlayers #longhair #layeredhaircut

hairstyles.name: Butterfly Layers
hairstyles.description: A heavily layered cut with shorter, voluminous layers on top that blend into much longer layers underneath, creating a dramatic fanning effect. Shown in chocolate brown with honey balayage for dimension and shine.
hairstyles.alt_text: Woman with long wavy Butterfly Layers hairstyle and honey balayage
hairstyles.seo_title: Butterfly Layers Hairstyle — Honey Balayage | WallRank
hairstyles.seo_description: Butterfly Layers: short voluminous top layers blending into long lengths, shown in chocolate brown with honey balayage. See the full look on WallRank.
hairstyles.og_description: Big volume up top, long flowing layers below, honey balayage — Butterfly Layers.
hairstyles.pinterest_description: Butterfly Layers hairstyle inspiration — dramatic layers, honey balayage, effortless volume. Save this look! #butterflylayers #balayage #layeredhaircut

hairstyles.name: Soft Shag
hairstyles.description: A modernized, softer take on the classic shag — feathered layers throughout for texture and movement, paired with wispy bangs. Shown in cool brown with cinnamon brown undertones.
hairstyles.alt_text: Woman with a medium-length wavy Soft Shag hairstyle, cinnamon brown tones

hairstyles.pinterest_description: Soft Shag hairstyle inspiration — feathered layers, cinnamon brown tones. Save this look! #softshag #shaghaircut #texturedhair

hairstyles.name: Hollywood Layers
hairstyles.description: A glamorous, voluminous layered blowout style associated with red-carpet styling — long, bouncy waves throughout for maximum movement and shine. Shown in rich chocolate with warm caramel undertones.
hairstyles.alt_text: Woman with long wavy Hollywood Layers hairstyle, rich chocolate and caramel tones

hairstyles.name: Modern Wolf Cut
hairstyles.description: A hybrid of shag and mullet styles — choppy, heavily layered hair with volume concentrated at the crown and tapering ends, paired with wispy curtain bangs. Shown in dark ash brown with caramel highlights, styled to medium length.
hairstyles.alt_text: Woman with a medium-length wavy Modern Wolf Cut hairstyle, dark ash brown with caramel highlights
